subcodes.first_line: Come, O My Pen! How farest thou on this Day? Hath the wine of mystic knowledge intoxicated thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعال یا قلمی کیف حالک فی هذا الیوم ا اخذک سکر رحیق العرفان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
